message:
test(core): add NullPaneScrollbackAccess unit tests (ft-dwjtm)

Add 7 tests covering the NullPaneScrollbackAccess stub used by the
runtime maintenance loop before real TieredScrollback instances are
wired in. Tests verify: empty pane IDs, None snapshots, zero eviction
returns, no-panic evict_all, telemetry accumulation under normal and
elevated pressure via evaluate() with null panes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
